Automation Sprint

A focused 2-6 week build that turns one recurring workflow into a system your team can run.

What the sprint fixes

One recurring workflow gets rebuilt end to end: intake, routing, automation, documentation, reporting, and owner handoff.

Includes

  • Workflow mapping and bottleneck definition.
  • Input quality rules and intake redesign.
  • Automation, routing, and notification buildout.
  • Reporting surface, run log, or dashboard.
  • SOP, owner handoff, and team training.

Examples

  • Lead handoff and meeting booking.
  • Client onboarding and asset collection.
  • Project intake validation.
  • Weekly reporting and operations summaries.
